summary: costo_manual feature for BOM SERVICIO lines - complete testing. Backend: 9/10 tests passed (90%). Frontend: All UI features verified working correctly.

minor.issue: Cannot explicitly set costo_manual to null - sending null preserves the previous value instead of clearing it
minor.note: This is a minor edge case - line 290 uses 'if data.costo_manual is not None' which treats explicit null as 'not sent'

passed_tests: Backend: PUT /api/bom/{bom_id}/lineas/{linea_id} saves costo_manual field correctly when sent
Backend: PUT /api/bom/{bom_id}/lineas/{linea_id} preserves costo_manual when not sent in payload
Backend: GET /api/bom/{bom_id}/costo-estandar uses costo_manual for SERVICIO lines (precio_unitario = costo_manual)
Backend: GET /api/bom/{bom_id}/costo-estandar uses costo_promedio from inventario for non-SERVICIO lines
Backend: POST /api/bom/{bom_id}/duplicar copies costo_manual to new BOM lines
Backend: SERVICIO line exists with tipo_componente='SERVICIO'
Backend: BOM cabecera and lineas structure verified
Backend: costo_manual fallback to inventory cost when null works correctly
Frontend: Navigate to Modelos -> Edit 'Eduard' model -> BOM/Receta tab
Frontend: 'Costo Unit.' column header present in BOM table
Frontend: SERVICIO lines (SER-001 Corte, SER-002 Costura, SER-003 Lavanderia, SER-004 Acabado) show editable NumericInput in 'Costo Unit.' column
Frontend: Non-SERVICIO lines (TEL-001 Arkanzas=TELA, BOT-01=AVIO) show read-only inventory cost as text (S/ 15.00, S/ 1.00)
Frontend: Editing costo_manual in SERVICIO line updates the costo estándar total dynamically
Frontend: Legend includes explanation: 'Costo Unit.: para Servicios es editable manualmente; para materiales se toma del costo promedio de inventario'
Frontend: Costo Estándar por Prenda breakdown table shows correct pricing per type (AVIO, SERVICIO, TELA)
Frontend: Dynamic update verified: changing Corte from S/0.55 to S/50.00 updated SERVICIO total from S/17.02 to S/91.20
action_items: LOW: Consider allowing explicit null for costo_manual in PUT endpoint if clearing the manual cost is a valid use case
critical_code_review_comments: Backend bom.py correctly implements costo_manual: saves on create/update, uses for SERVICIO in costo-estandar calculation, copies during duplication
Frontend ModelosBOM.jsx correctly distinguishes between SERVICIO (editable NumericInput) and non-SERVICIO (read-only text from inventory)
NumericInput component handles empty values correctly (shows empty instead of 0)
Debounced autosave (800ms) prevents excessive API calls while editing
seed_data_creation: Used existing data: BOM 2a7a6511-89f4-4a2f-a987-745c8df37842 (BOM-EDUARD-V1), SERVICIO linea 0702cd73-2376-46c9-a20e-5d071ec098af (SER-001 Corte)
context_for_next_testing_agent: costo_manual feature fully implemented and working. BOM-EDUARD-V1 has 6 lines: 1 TELA (Arkanzas), 1 AVIO (Boton Negro), 4 SERVICIO (Corte, Costura, Lavanderia, Acabado). All SERVICIO lines have editable costo_manual in frontend. Current test costo_manual for SER-001 Corte set to 10.00.
